spec.name: Climbing The Great Pyramid
spec.description: Hot air rises off the sides of the pyramid, and the wind chokes you with a flurry of sand and dust. So far you have made it halfway up the side. The walls of the pyramid are quite steep.

north.description: If you are daring you could try to skirt around to the northern side.

south.description: If you are daring you could try to skirt around to the southern side.

up.description: It looks too dangerous to try to climb any higher.

down.description: Far below you are the burning sands of the desert.

extra_descs.description: You wonder how anyone could have built such a massive thing out in this heat.
